Typealiases.html#/s:6Common8LogLevela.name: LogLevel
Typealiases.html#/s:6Common8LogLevela.abstract: LogLevel is associated with UInt since each should correspond to different levels of information.

Protocols/LogFormatterType.html#/s:6Comm.name: format(_:level:date:fileID:line:column:function:)
Protocols/LogFormatterType.html#/s:6Comm.abstract: Formats a log message with the given parameters.

Protocols/DefaultValueProvider.html.name: DefaultValueProvider
Protocols/DefaultValueProvider.html.abstract: The type conforming to this protocol should provide a default value.

Protocols/LogFormatterType.html.name: LogFormatterType
Protocols/LogFormatterType.html.abstract: Defines a Log formatter, which can be used to standardize the log messages.

Protocols/LoggerType.html.name: LoggerType
Protocols/LoggerType.html.abstract: Defines a type of Logger to log messages to.

Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE7v.name: verbose
Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE7v.abstract: Allows the maximum amount of information to appear in the logs.

Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE5d.name: debug
Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE5d.abstract: Allows errors, warnings, info and debug messages to appear in the logs.

Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE4i.name: info
Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE4i.abstract: Allows errors, warnings and info messages to appear in the logs.

Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE7w.name: warning
Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE7w.abstract: Allows errors and warnings to appear in the logs.

Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE5e.name: error
Extensions/LogLevel.html#/s:Su6CommonE5e.abstract: Allows only errors to appear in the logs.

Extensions/DateFormatter.html#/s:So15NSD.name: fullDateMilliseconds
Extensions/DateFormatter.html#/s:So15NSD.abstract: A DateFormatter that displays the full date and time including milliseconds.

Extensions/JSONEncoder.html#/s:10Foundat.name: withFullISO8601Strategy
Extensions/JSONEncoder.html#/s:10Foundat.abstract: A JSONEncoder with a custom date encoding strategy using the full ISO 8601 standard.

Extensions/JSONDecoder.html#/s:10Foundat.name: withFullISO8601Strategy
Extensions/JSONDecoder.html#/s:10Foundat.abstract: A JSONDecoder with a custom date decoding strategy using the full ISO 8601 standard.

Extensions/ISO8601DateFormatter.html#/s:.name: fullISO8601
Extensions/ISO8601DateFormatter.html#/s:.abstract: A ISO8601DateFormatter that handles dates using the full ISO 8601 standard.

Classes/UnifiedLogger.html#/s:6Common13U.name: log(_:level:date:fileID:line:column:function:)
Classes/UnifiedLogger.html#/s:6Common13U.abstract: Logs a message to the Unified Logging System if the LogLevel is supported.

Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.name: dateFormatter
Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.abstract: A DateFormatter to be provide a formatted string based on the date/time a message is logged.

Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.name: init(dateFormatter:)
Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.abstract: Creates an instance of LogFormatter with the given DateFormatter.

Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.name: format(_:level:date:fileID:line:column:function:)
Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.abstract: Formats a log message with the given parameters.

Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.name: symbol(for:)
Classes/LogFormatter.html#/s:6Common12Lo.abstract: Provides a special symbol for a given LogLevel.

Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC12defaul.name: defaultQueue
Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC12defaul.abstract: The default DispatchQueue used to log all the messages asynchronoulsy.

Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC7loggers.name: loggers
Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC7loggers.abstract: An array of LoggerType to use to log messages to multiple loggers.

Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC6sharedA.name: shared
Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC6sharedA.abstract: A shared instance of Log created with the Log.defaultQueue.

Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC5queueAC.name: init(queue:)
Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC5queueAC.abstract: Creates an instance of Log with the given DispatchQueue.

Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC12setupL.name: setupLoggers(_:)
Classes/Log.html#/s:6Common3LogC12setupL.abstract: Set the collection of loggers to log the messages to.

Classes/LogFormatter.html.name: LogFormatter
Classes/LogFormatter.html.abstract: Formats log messages to make them more dev-friendly.

Classes/UnifiedLogger.html.name: UnifiedLogger
Classes/UnifiedLogger.html.abstract: An implementation of LoggerType which uses the Unified Logging System.

Typealiases.html.name: Type Aliases
Typealiases.html.abstract: The following type aliases are available globally.
